caption: The video captures a panel discussion taking place in a conference room setting. Three individuals are seated at individual tables, each equipped with microphones and water bottles, suggesting a formal presentation or debate. The central figure, a woman, appears to be speaking, gesturing with her hands as she addresses the audience or the other panelists. To her left, a man is seated, listening attentively, while another man on the right stands near a banner that reads "Interactie tussen Wetenschap Praktijk en Zorgvraag," indicating the theme of the event relates to the interaction between science, practice, and care needs. The audience is not visible, but the setup suggests an organized and professional environment aimed at fostering dialogue and knowledge exchange.
